Outdoor Kitchens

Design your dream outdoor kitchen.

Have a vision for the perfect outdoor kitchen? I can help you bring it to life. You choose the design — I'll make it solid.

You pick the design. I handle everything else.

I can build everything from scratch to the final finish — or weld the steel cage so you can complete the finish yourself.

Whether you want a simple grill island or a fully custom configuration, everything is made to fit your space, your layout, and your budget.

01 · Construction

Custom steel frame, built to your dimensions.

Heavy-duty work, clean welds — designed for grills, smokers, sinks, fridges, and stone or concrete finishes.

Galvanized Steel Studs

Corrosion-resistant galvanized steel studs — commercial-grade framing, built for the outdoors.

G60 Coating G90 Coating 18 Gauge 16 Gauge

Engineered to Endure

Heavier 16-gauge steel and higher-zinc G90 are available on every collection. Structural strength is standard, never a premium upgrade.

Corrosion Resistant Salt-Air Ready Fire-Conscious
02 · Exterior Cladding

A finish for every setting.

Stone, concrete, tile, composite — every cladding option is weatherproof and built to match your space.

01 HDPE

Starboard Panels

Marine-grade HDPE. Won't fade, warp, or rot.

02 Durock Substrate

Stone, Tile & Stucco

Cement board clad in stone, tile, or stucco.

03 Composite Wood

Composite Cladding

The warmth of timber, none of the upkeep.

04 Architectural Metal

Metal Panels

Clean, contemporary, industrial finish.

05 Siding

Composite Siding

Profiles that echo fine exterior architecture.

06 PVC & Wood-Look

PVC & Faux-Wood

Exterior-grade boards that look like real wood.

04 · Standard Line

Three sizes, ready to specify.

Prefer something tailored? Our custom program builds to any footprint — same structural standards, your dimensions.

05 · Build Options

Choose how far I go.

Every kitchen shares the same custom steel frame and clean welds. The option defines how much of the finishing work is mine — or yours.

Option · Full Build

Full Build

From foundation to final finish

I handle everything — steel frame, cladding, appliances, and finish. Ready to use.

  • Custom steel frame fabrication
  • Built to your exact dimensions
  • Appliance integration included
  • Stone, concrete, or composite finish
Most Popular

Frame + Finish

Custom layout · any footprint

Custom steel cage plus guidance on materials, layout, and finishing so nothing gets missed.

  • Fully custom steel frame
  • Design planning included
  • Material & finish suggestions
  • Appliance layout consultation
  • Built to your space & budget
Option · DIY-Friendly

Frame Only

Steel cage · you finish it

I weld the steel cage to your dimensions. You complete the cladding and finish yourself.

  • Same heavy-duty steel structure
  • Clean welds, built to spec
  • Designed for grills, smokers, sinks & fridges
  • Save on labor — finish it your way
Let's Build

Tell me your space. I'll handle the rest.

Share your overall size, the appliances you want, and whether you prefer full build or frame only. I'll design it and make it solid.
